breakingChangesNotes:
#### Box Event Collector
The 'Maximum number of events per page' parameter has been removed; the per-request page size is now fixed internally at the Box API maximum. Additionally, the ***box-get-events*** command's 'page_size' argument has been replaced with a 'limit' argument that caps the total number of events returned. Update any scripts or automations that pass 'page_size' to this command to use 'limit'. Refer to the release notes for additional details.
